fixturePurpose: Documentation-only example for ACP-GAP-001; this file is not a production schema and does not bypass artifact validation.

producer.trustBoundary: CI and test runner logs are producer output. The control plane trusts schema-backed summaries, required-check status, and reviewer disposition rather than raw log text alone.

source.entrypoint: GitHub Actions pull_request workflow and local pnpm test commands
source.evidenceSurface: check run conclusion, command transcript, coverage summary, and uploaded report envelope

rawSignals.value: verify-lite and unit tests completed successfully for the changed files.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: A green check supports the scoped test claim only after the summary path and head SHA are validated.

rawSignals.value: Coverage was collected for changed files, but this fixture does not claim product-wide safety.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: Coverage is supporting evidence, not proof of high-assurance claims.

rawSignals.value: No rerun was required for this fixture; stale or cancelled runs would need separate classification.
rawSignals.rawAssertionBoundary: Current and stale CI state must remain distinct before policy decisions consume the evidence.

changedFiles.role: unit regression coverage for a demo artifact path
coverage producer output consumed as review evidence

commands.evidenceUse: Focused regression evidence for the changed demo behavior.
Broader unit suite evidence for release readiness; still not formal proof.
Coverage input for quality-scorecard review; thresholds are policy context, not an agent approval.

claimsMentioned.rawAssertion: The focused and full unit suites passed on the PR head.
claimsMentioned.controlPlaneBoundary: Test evidence supports a tested claim within command scope; it does not become proof or approval.

claimsMentioned.rawAssertion: Coverage artifacts are available to the quality gate and reviewer.
claimsMentioned.controlPlaneBoundary: Policy may use coverage context, but the raw coverage log does not emit a pass decision by itself.

expectedArtifacts.purpose: Capture required-check status and command evidence for the PR head.
Route coverage and quality gate results into reviewer-visible summary evidence.
Preserve CI report metadata and provenance for downstream review surfaces.
Summarize raw CI/test-runner signals as report-only producer evidence without emitting approval.
Represent test-backed claims using existing claim status vocabulary.
Return failed or missing CI evidence to the producer when checks are not clean.

knownGaps.summary: CI raw logs remain descriptive examples; generated summaries are the contract-backed artifacts.
Reviewer surfaces should separate green test evidence from proof or approval language.
